name: quality-workflow
description: Machine-readable quality validation workflow definition — extraction quality assessment, scoring, and reporting.

steps.name: Assess DOM Completeness
steps.description: Calculate percentage of DOM elements successfully extracted (title, description, specifications, FAQ)

steps.name: Assess Asset Completeness
steps.description: Calculate percentage of assets (images, videos, downloads) successfully extracted

steps.name: Assess SEO Completeness
steps.description: Calculate percentage of SEO fields (title, meta description, keywords) successfully extracted

steps.name: Calculate Overall Score
steps.description: Calculate weighted average of all quality dimensions per quality-policy.json weights

steps.name: Generate Quality Report
steps.description: Generate structured quality report with scores, issues, and recommendations

domCompleteness.description: Percentage of DOM elements successfully extracted

imageCoverage.description: Percentage of product images successfully extracted

seoCompleteness.description: Percentage of SEO fields successfully extracted

schemaCompleteness.description: Percentage of schema.org structured data successfully extracted

enforcement.note: Quality validation is advisory — low-quality extractions are flagged but not blocked
